description: A powerful clan of the 'Ndrangheta based in Castellace and Oppido Mamertina in the Gioia Tauro plain, Calabria, Italy. Founded in the 1930s, it is involved in racketeering, kidnapping, and extortion. The clan is closely linked to the Rugolo clan through intermarriage and has been involved in a long feud with the Barbaro clan. It remains active.
